title: Cobblemon: Fierce Competition
description: Adding trainers to Cobblemon the right way
body:
# Welcome to Cobblemon: Fierce Competition!
### Requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
Heyo! Lets cut to the chase;

![Divider - 4x res](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e63fac2b0ce3f1778f0ac07443c0fbaebf7f330.png)
This datapack aims to fix a lot of niches and pet peeves I have with other trainer addons in the Cobblemon community. Instead of just cramming a bunch of trainers into Cobblemon and calling it a day, this addon will feature (when complete);

- 5 Custom gym leaders meant to fit in the Minecraft environment
- 19 Trainer classes with teams carefully developed for each phase of the game
- Interactive NPCs that cover various functions
- A (somewhat) interesting lore integration and a rewarding conclusion
- Small custom structures that do not interfere with your playthrough
- Reworked/reutilized mechanics from vanilla that seamlessly include cobblemon into your world 
- Some brand-new items previously unimplemented from the games

![Divider - 4x res](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e63fac2b0ce3f1778f0ac07443c0fbaebf7f330.png)
We have a [Trello board](https://trello.com/b/fj2p0MGY/cobblemon-fierce-competition) so you can track our progress!


<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>
  
[Mob AI Commands (β4 hotfix+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-ai-commands)

[ETF & EMF (β5+)](https://modrinth.com/collection/kIO71bBq)

</details>



Also check out the [wiki!](https://fiercecompetition.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page)
